text:
Driven by instinct.

In a world gone tame, the new Sonet is here to set you free. Chiselled to perfection, raw in power, and loaded with tech, it's built to give you a one-of-a-kind driving experience. So, get in and let your wild instincts take over.

The majestic attitude of the new Sonet is sure to make a statement. Redesigned to look intimidating with a bold new tiger nose grille and a suave connected taillight set up, the new Sonet commands respect and dominates wherever it goes.

Electric Sunroof Rear Spoiler provides a sporty and dynamic appeal to the wild design gives compact SUV enthusiasts a chance to connect with the outside world Signature Tiger Nose Grille takes the untamed style quotient to stunning new heights Star Map LED Connected Tail Lamps make the back look impressive and distinctive as you drive away Sporty Aerodynamic Rear Skid Plates with Dark Metallic Accents add an edge to the car’s unbridled design appeal Sleek LED Fog Lamps enhance the overall front appeal Crown Jewel LED Headlamps and Star Map LED DRLs highlight the bold front and give it a dazzling road presence R16 - 40.56 cm (16”) Sporty Crystal Cut Alloy Wheels give your wheels a striking spin as you prowl the streets A dominating stance.

Wild outside. Peaceful inside.

Fierce on the outside, spacious and calm inside; the new Sonet is here to sharpen your sense of comfort. Be it the smart pure air purifier with virus & bacteria protection, a futuristic digital screen & cluster, or front ventilated seats and 4-way power driver’s seat; the abundance of tech in the new Sonet will put you in a state of serenity.

Smart Pure Air Purifier with Virus and Bacteria Protectionˇ ensures you breathe the cleanest of air inside Front Ventilated Seats make every drive a breeze in hot and humid conditions Center Fascia AC Vents ensure optimal airflow for driver and passenger, with the center console placed within easy reach of both

26.03 cm (10.25’’) HD Touchscreen Navigation enables you to stay in command when it comes to finding your way effortlessly 4-way Power Driver’s Seat helps you get the perfect driving stance and maximum comfort Full Digital Cluster with 26.04 cm (10.25’’) Color LCD MID provides real-time information and vehicle status updates LED Ambient Sound Lighting creates the perfect atmosphere for every drive Bose Premium 7-speaker System lets your favorite tracks calm you through the chaos on the streets

Electronic Stability Control (ESC), Hill Assist Control (HAC) & Vehicle Stability Management (VSM) 6 Airbags as Standard Blind View Monitor (BVM) Front and Rear Parking Sensors 360 Degree Camera All Wheel Disc Brakes All Seat 3-point Seatbelt with Reminder Emergency Stop Signal (ESS) Exceptionally secure.

With such raw ferocity comes the responsibility to keep you and your loved ones out of harm's way. That’s why we’ve built the new Sonet with robust 15 safety features across all variants; giving you dependable safety and a calm sense of security.

Power 61 kW/ 6 000 rpm Torque 115 Nm/ 4 200 rpm Advanced Smartstream G1.2 Petrol Engine 5 Speed MT Power 85 kW/ 4 000 rpm Torque 250 Nm/ 1 500-2 750 rpm Refined 1.5l CRDi VGT Diesel Engine 6 Speed MT 6 Speed Advance AT 6 Speed iMT Powerful Smartstream G1.0 T-GDi Petrol Engine Smartstream 6iMT Smartstream 7DCT Power 88 kW/ 6 000 rpm Torque 172 Nm/ 1 500-4 000 rpm allow the car to become your shield and protect you from every side come as a part of standard safety package, making your journey safe and reliable eliminates any blind spots and surprises, giving you a holistic driving view make parking and manoeuvring at tricky spots safe and simple alerts the driver behind by blinking the brake lights whilst braking sharply and severely reminds you to strap in whether your’re in the front or back enhance braking performance, so you are always in control keeps you aware of your surroundings at all times Power of a beast.

At the heart of every new Sonet is an engine throbbing with power. Power that's honed by precision driving dynamics from a wide range of refined and fuel-efficient engines mated to multiple transmission options.

So choose your favorite combination, put pedal to metal, and let every road hear you roar.

Impressive Performance

Always protected.

Manoeuvre the roads with confidence. The new Sonet is equipped with an intuitive Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) Level 1 featuring 10 autonomous safety features that help make your drive more responsive with multiple safeguards.

Lane Departure Warning (LDW) alerts the driver whenever the car is going out of its lane on either side without turn indicator input Lane Keep Assist (LKA) counter steers to prevent vehicle from departing from its lane Forward Collision-Avoidance Assist-Cycle (FCA-Cyclist) alerts the driver of imminent collision with any cyclists ahead and applies brake Forward Collision-Avoidance Assist-Pedestrian (FCA-Pedestrian) alerts the driver of imminent collision with any pedestrians ahead and applies brake Forward Collision Warning (FCW) alerts the driver of imminent collision Forward Collision-Avoidance Assist-Car (FCA-Car) alerts the driver of imminent collision with the car ahead and applies brake High Beam Assist (HBA) automatically adjusts the high beam/ low beam based on the oncoming vehicle’s headlamp intensity Lane Following Assist (LFA) steers to keep the car in the center of the lane Driver Attention Warning (DAW) alerts the driver based on driver’s attention level Leading Vehicle Departure Alert (LVDA) informs the driver if the vehicle in front starts moving and driver does not react

Navigation Enjoy comfortable commuting with LIVE traffic updates, LIVE vehicle tracking and other features.

Safety & Security Protect your car 24x7. If anyone tries to mishandle your car, Kia Connect will alert you immediately so that you can take timely action.

Vehicle Management Stay updated with the well-being of your car and manage regular maintenance reports.

The magic of 5 Remote Control Start and stop the engine, control the AC, lock and unlock or even check vehicle status remotely.

5 functionalities that let you experience convenience at its best.

Convenience Artificial Intelligence powered voice-recognition provides enhanced driving experience and excellent driving pleasure.

Trained to your command.

Remote Climate Control Lock/ Unlock Vehicle Fuel Level

Information Find My Car Tyre Pressure

Information Horn & Light Control Mobile App available on:

Smartwatch connectivity on:

Untamed as it may be, the new Sonet is yours to command. Next-gen Kia Connect integrates with Amazon Alexa for home-to-car connectivity, and 70+ features that let you control your vehicle through a smartphone or smartwatch.

Connected Features OTA Map & System Update offers latest map and system updates conveniently via over-the-air technology Remote AC Control gives you the power to set your car to the perfect temperature from anywhere Voice Controlled Window Function lets you pull up or open your windows without taking your hands off the wheel Find My Car with Surround View Monitoring gives you the images of your car according to the camera angles and monitor your surroundings

*Terms & Conditions Apply. This brochure features a fictional "claw mark" on a road sign for entertainment purposes only. We do not endorse vandalism or illegal activities related to road safety. Safety is a top priority, and we urge responsible behavior regarding traffic regulations and road safety. The product & feature images shown in this brochure is for representation purpose only. Features and specifications as shown may not be part of standard fitment and may vary. The colors shown are subject to availability and may not be available across all variants and may differ slightly from those shown in this brochure. Segment is defined as Vehicle with length between 3 990 mm – 3 999 mm and height - 1 570 mm. **VDA Method. ˇThe tests of protection from Virus & Bacteria are conducted with a defined process, under particular circumstances in a controlled environment and the results may vary. ^With R16 alloy wheel and roof rails. #Advanced Driver Assistance System (ADAS) is not a substitute for human eye and driver vigilance. It is an assistance feature that enhances driving experience and safety. Effectiveness of ADAS may vary based on actual situation and all objects around vehicle may not be detected. The driver shall remain responsible for safe, vigilant, and attentive driving. ˇˇˇKia Connect comes with 3 years free subscription. Amazon Alexa and Smartwatch device are not standard car accessories & the customer needs to purchase from a third party. Kia Connect features may vary depending on the variant, device compatibility, software and network availability both in the vehicle and Alexa device. Kia Connect skill is only available in India and can be interacted with in English and Hindi. ºRSA coverage across India except Andaman & Nicobar Islands and Lakshadweep. The specifications and features may vary depending on models/ variants. Kia India Pvt. Ltd. (Formerly known as Kia Motors

India Private Limited) reserves the right to make any changes with respect to the trims, colors, specifications, Kia Connect features and other details of any model as mentioned in this brochure or to discontinue any model without prior notice.
